summary: The diff implements REQ-56 by updating ProductCard.tsx and PhotoGallery.tsx to use aspect-ratio: 1/1 with object-fit: cover. However, ProductDetailModal.tsx is not present in the list of modified files in the diff, so it is unclear whether it was updated.

missing_requirements.requirement: ProductDetailModal.tsx renders product images with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
missing_requirements.reason: ProductDetailModal.tsx does not appear in the list of modified files in the diff. There is no evidence that its image aspect ratio was updated to 1/1.
